subcodes.first_line: O leaf of certitude! Under the shade of the Tree of divine mercy, in this day there have arisen women, each one a mighty sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه در ظل سدره رحمانیت الیوم نساای مبعوث شده اند که هر یک ایت کبری
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @chastity and purity, @call to action, @high station of the true believer
